title: hieracium rohacsense subsp. rauzense
intro: Hieracium rohacsense subsp. rauzense is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its medicinal and culinary uses. It is valued for its bitter compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The plant's health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Hieracium rohacsense subsp. rauzense is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
